notes: Core mechanics present (barrels, ladders, hammer, lives, score) but barrel physics are erratic, ladder climbing is unreliable, jump arc feels floaty and imprecise, and the visual style is generic shapes rather than recognizable Donkey Kong sprites/layout.
A solid and playable recreation using canvas primitives, though it misses some core arcade mechanics like fall damage and proper hammer collision timing.
A recognizable and mostly working Donkey Kong clone, but core authenticity is limited by simplified enemy/level behavior, rough climbing/jumping logic, and only moderate visual resemblance.
